entries.scenario: Appended a reference to an undefined variable '__THIS_DOES_NOT_EXIST__'. Expected: NameError.
entries.root_cause: A variable or function is used before it is defined or imported.
entries.short_fix: Define or import the variable before using it.

entries.root_cause: A division or modulo operation has zero as its divisor.
entries.short_fix: Guard every division with a denominator != 0 check.

entries.scenario: Appended a loop that spins for 10 s, simulating a timeout scenario. The sandbox execution limit will trigger before it exits.
entries.error_message: name 'st' is not defined. Did you mean: 'set'?
entries.root_cause: A variable or function is used before it is defined or imported.
entries.short_fix: Define or import the variable before using it.

entries.scenario: Appended infinite recursion call. Expected: RecursionError.
entries.root_cause: A function calls itself indefinitely with no base case.
entries.short_fix: Add a base case to every recursive function.

entries.scenario: Appended dictionary access with a non-existent key. Expected: KeyError.
entries.root_cause: A dictionary (or DataFrame) was accessed with a key that does not exist.
entries.short_fix: Validate that all expected keys/columns exist before accessing them.
